CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-04-2019 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-10-2019 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Sep-10-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-23-2019 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2018 Set For Trial On Jun-10-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Application In Support Of Request For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-19-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for a specially set Default Prove-Up Hearing & Request for Permanent Injunction against defendant Pekard Diamonds, LTD.
Dept. 514. Judge: Eric R. Fleming. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Plaintiff Adi Simayof was present in pro per, placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Pekard Diamonds, LTD or Meir Dahan, sued as Mehir Dahan.
Plaintiff's complaint for defamation/slander was filed on November 14, 2017, and personally served on defendant Pekard Diamonds, LTD on December 14, 2017.
Proof of Service of Summons & Complaint as to defendant Pekard Diamonds, LTD was filed on September 21, 2018.
Default was entered against defendant Pekard Diamonds, LTD on September 21, 2018.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Adi Simayof, an individual, and issues a Permanent Injunction against Defendant Pikard Diamonds, LTD, the terms of which are contained on page two of the Order Granting the Permanent Injunction.

Proposed Order Granting a Permanent Injunction against defendant Pekard Diamonds, LTD was submitted to and signed by the Court.
